# MaxLiving Chiropractic New Braunfels

## Business Information
- Name: MaxLiving Chiropractic New Braunfels
- Address: 741 Generations Dr Suite 200, New Braunfels, TX 78130
- Phone: (830) 255-4350
- Website: https://ml-chiro-newbraunfels.vercel.app
- Rating: 5.0 stars (67 Google reviews)
- Franchise: MaxLiving Health Center

## Philosophy
The best doctor lives inside of you -- we just remove the interference and let your body do what it's designed to do. We do not treat anything. We find the root cause and the body does the healing.

## Doctors
- Dr. Rachel Diestel, D.C. -- Structural Correction, Prenatal Care, Pediatric Care, Nutrition, Detoxification, Advanced Spinal Correction. Parker University. Pre- and peri-natal certified.
- Dr. Travis Diestel, D.C. -- Structural Correction, Prenatal Care, Pediatric Care, Corrective Exercise, Level 2 Activator. Parker University. US Army veteran (5 years). Certified Personal Trainer.

Both doctors are certified in and provide ALL services. They are equals in structural correction, prenatal care, and pediatric care.

## Staff
- Megan Word -- CA Tech & Certified Integrative Health Practitioner
- Amanda Wilson -- Patient Care Coordinator

## Services
- Chiropractic Adjustments / Advanced Spinal Correction
- Prenatal Chiropractic (Both Doctors)
- Pediatric Chiropractic (Both Doctors)
- Corrective Exercises (Both Doctors)
- Nutritional Coaching
- Detoxification

## Conditions We Help With
- Back Pain
- Neck Pain
- Sciatica
- Headaches & Migraines
- Pregnancy-related pain
- Pediatric developmental concerns
- Veteran/military chronic pain

## The MaxLiving 5 Essentials
1. Core Chiropractic
2. Nutrition
3. Mindset
4. Oxygen & Exercise
5. Minimize Toxins

## Office Hours
- Monday: 7:45-10:30 AM, 3:00-6:00 PM
- Tuesday: 7:45-10:30 AM
- Wednesday: 7:45-10:30 AM, 3:00-6:00 PM
- Thursday: 7:45-10:30 AM, 3:00-6:00 PM
- Friday-Sunday: Closed

## Service Areas
New Braunfels, San Marcos, Seguin, Canyon Lake, Kyle, Wimberley

## New Patient Special
$185 -- Includes consultation, comprehensive exam, X-rays (if needed), and first adjustment.
CareCredit accepted. Most insurance welcome.

## About
Dr. Rachel and Dr. Travis Diestel are a husband-wife chiropractic team. Rachel's health transformation through chiropractic -- overcoming kidney and reproductive health issues -- inspired Travis to leave the U.S. Army after 5 years of service and pursue chiropractic. Both graduated from Parker University. They opened MaxLiving Chiropractic in New Braunfels in 2020. Both doctors are certified in all services including structural correction, prenatal care, and pediatric care.

## Contact
- Email: dr.rachel@maxlivingnewbraunfels.com
- Email: info@maxlivingnewbraunfels.com
